title: Claude Code Skills Pack: Project Status Reporting — 5 Skills for Stakeholder Communication and Risk Visibility
description: For project managers and engineering leads, this pack generates weekly status reports, RAG status summaries, risk and blocker escalations, milestone progress narratives, and executive briefing snapshots so they can keep every stakeholder aligned without spending hours writing updates
gumroad_description:
Writing weekly status updates is time you could spend fixing the problems in them.

Who this is for:
— Project managers sending status reports to three or more stakeholder groups
— Engineering leads who manually compile risk registers and blockers every Friday
— Program managers who spend more time on communication than coordination

What's inside:
— Skill 1: Weekly status report generator from notes or Jira data
— Skill 2: RAG status summary writer (Red / Amber / Green with clear rationale)
— Skill 3: Risk and blocker escalation drafter
— Skill 4: Milestone progress narrative builder
— Skill 5: Executive briefing snapshot generator
— Installation guide + quick-reference trigger table

Every stakeholder aligned, no Friday afternoon lost. Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
